Video.summary: Emeril and young chef CJ Calhoun make a meal any kid would love!
Video.title: with CJ Calhoun, Dominique Taylor

Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril whips up diner favorites.
Video.title: Diner Classics

Video.summary: Emeril offers some delicious meatless entrees.
Video.title: Vegetarian Main Courses

Video.summary: Emeril shares the accessible and sustainable virtues of southern caviar.
Video.title: Sustainable Luxury: Southern Caviar

Video.summary: Emeril shares the tale of two Louisiana surfers who stumbled on the perfect seaside snack!
Video.title: A Surfer's Discovery: Sea Beans

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Creole cream cheese, which was almost lost until one family farm helped save it.
Video.title: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Image.alt: A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese
A Cheese Lost to Time: Creole Cream Cheese

Video.summary: Subtley sweet, Emeril shows you how to make the most of figs.
Video.title: Fig Envy

Video.summary: Emeril prepares dishes with saffron grown right in the southern United States.
Video.title: Saffron from the South

Video.summary: Emeril prepares a Tex-Mex menu to dazzle Houston Texan superfans.
Video.title: Houston Texans

Video.summary: After a visit to Louisiana's largest pecan farm, Emeril shares his favorite recipes.
Video.title: Pecan Paradise

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Janie Glade create an economical meal that makes use of pantry staples.
Video.title: with Janie Glade

Video.summary: Emeril and dairy farm owner Sarah Roland create dishes using buffalo mozzarella.
Video.title: with Sarah Roland

Video.summary: Any time of year is a great time for a cookout! Join Emeril for a grilled menu.
Video.title: Grill It Up!

Video.summary: Emeril's collard greens recipes, inspired by Farmer Jones' fresh produce.
Video.title: Collard Greens For All

Video.summary: For a Tampa Bay-style tailgate, treat your guests to Emeril's grilled fish with coconut rice.
Video.title: Tampa Bay Buccaneers

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Morning Glory, an invasive vegetable grown only by special permission.
Video.title: Illegal Greens: Morning Glory

Video.summary: Emeril takes you on a trip to Spain as he shares his favorite meals.
Video.title: Taste of Spain

Video.summary: Oysters Rockefeller, Oyster Soup
Video.title: Oysters

Video.summary: Emeril makes Louisiana Bourbon the star ingredient in three recipes.
Video.title: Louisiana Bourbon

Video.summary: For a New York-style tailgate, indulge in some of New York City's Italian favorites.
Video.title: New York Jets

Video.summary: Crawfish Bread, Baptist Church Fried Chicken Wings, Pralines
Video.title: Jazz Fest

Video.summary: Emeril celebrates strawberry season with three picnic-ready recipes.
Video.title: Strawberry Festival

Video.summary: Emeril shows you how versatile phyllo dough is as he makes both sweet and savory dishes.
Video.title: The Magic of Phyllo

Video.summary: Garlic Aioli, Garlicky Bread Soup, Spicy Garlic Bread, Sauteed Frog Legs
Video.title: Garlic Galore

Video.summary: Triumph at your next tailgate with Emeril's easy (and crowd-pleasing) crab dishes.
Video.title: Baltimore Ravens

Video.summary: Crawfish and Mirliton Soup; Paned Oysters; Hickory-Smoked Pork Chops; Chicory Coffee Creme Brulee
Video.title: New New Orleans Cooking

Video.summary: Basic Dough, Duck Confit, Smoked Mozzarella and Oven Roasted Tomato Pizza, Smoked Barbecue Chicken Pizza
Video.title: NOLA Pizzas

Video.summary: Emeril highlights some staple recipes found on backroad kitchen tables.
Video.title: Louisiana Backroads

Video.summary: Stuffed Lobster, Lobster Stew, Lobster and Vanilla Salad, Lobster Cheesecake
Video.title: Emeril's Lobster Fest

Video.summary: Pecan-Crusted Mozzarella with Baby Greens, Smoked Mozzarella, Lamb and Grilled Vegetable Mille-Feuille
Video.title: Fresh Mozzarella

Video.summary: Chorizo Scallops with Cilantro Guacamole and Tortilla Strips, Seared Scallops with Fresh Corn and Truffles
Video.title: Scallops

Video.summary: Gumbo, Fried Okra Salad, Stewed Okra with Creole Chicken
Video.title: Cooking with Okra

Video.summary: Succotash, Crawfish Rellenos with Red Bean Sauce, Peanut Butter Pie
Video.title: Legumes

Video.summary: Grilled Ramp Soup, Stuffed Morels with Crawfish Remoulade
Video.title: New Emeril's

Video.summary: Funky Asian Lentil Salad, Red Lentil Cakes, Chorizo and Roasted Tomato Ragu
Video.title: Lentils

Video.summary: Emeril presents a few of his favorite Creole dishes from New Orleans.
Video.title: Creole Cuisine

Video.summary: Shrimp Stock, Shrimp and Grits, Sweet Corn Relish, Piau, Huguenot Torte
Video.title: Low Country
